message:
chore(beads): update task tracking for completed work

Update Beads issue tracker to reflect recent development progress across
multiple workstreams in the UltraSearch Windows file explorer project:

Epic closed:
- ultrasearch-c00.3 (NTFS events + metadata index): Successfully completed
  all core functionality including volume discovery, MFT enumeration, USN
  journal tailing, metadata cache implementation, and Tantivy metadata index
  construction. All acceptance criteria met including index build, sub-5s lag,
  journal wrap detection, and corruption recovery paths.

Tasks closed:
- ultrasearch-c00.3.3 (USN journal tailer and resync): Completed change journal
  reader loop with FileEvent translation, journal wrap detection, and automated
  resync scheduling. Meta-index ingest fully wired in service startup flow,
  operational from NTFS volume discovery through MFT enumeration to meta-index
  ingestion.

- ultrasearch-c00.5.4 (OCR integration for image-only docs): Completed Tesseract
  integration with image-only PDF and image file detection, per-page OCR
  processing, text merging, and language tagging. Resource limits enforced
  per worker job contract.

Tasks in progress:
- ultrasearch-c00.5.3 (Optional IFilter bridge): COM-based IFilter fallback for
  unsupported document types now under active development with STA threading
  model and format selection logic.

This update synchronizes task tracking across the multi-agent development
environment, ensuring accurate status visibility for the core indexing pipeline,
content extraction capabilities, and Windows-specific NTFS integration features.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
